title: Orc Hunter leaving field returns linked Limited Summon

card.rawText: During your turn, you may Limited Summon 1 Common / Uncommon Beast-type creature from your hand, max 1. Return that creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

effect.value: During your turn, you may Limited Summon 1 Common / Uncommon Beast-type creature from your hand, max 1. Return that creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Orc Hunter leaving field returns linked Limited Summon
plan.summary: Verify Orc Hunter?s movement cleanup returns the linked Limited Summon to hand.

notes: Read text first: During your turn, you may Limited Summon 1 Common / Uncommon Beast-type creature from your hand, max 1. Return that creature to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

steps: Create an Orc Hunter linked Limited Summon.
Move Orc Hunter off the field.
Verify the linked Limited Summon returns to hand.

expectedAssertions.label: Orc Hunter linked summon cleanup returned the summon
Orc Hunter cleanup did not just move the source card

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Verify Orc Hunter?s movement cleanup returns the linked Limited Summon to hand.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
